preReview.title: Real Salt Lake contra Minnesota United: Ramsay espera consolidar el bloqueo contra Seattle
preReview.description: Minnesota United continuará su lucha por el primer puesto en la Conferencia Oeste cuando se enfrenten a Real Salt Lake de visitante.

preReview.title: Real Salt Lake v Minnesota United: Ramsay hoping to build on Seattle shutout
preReview.description: Minnesota United will continue their fight for top spot in the Western Conference when they face Real Salt Lake on the road.

preReview.title: Real Salt Lake v Minnesota United: Ramsay spera di costruire sul successo contro Seattle
preReview.description: Il Minnesota United continuerà la lotta per il primo posto nella Western Conference quando affronterà il Real Salt Lake in trasferta.

preReview.title: Real Salt Lake x Minnesota United: Ramsay espera construir sobre o jogo sem sofrer gols contra Seattle
preReview.description: O Minnesota United continuará sua luta pelo primeiro lugar na Conferência Oeste quando enfrentar o Real Salt Lake fora de casa.

preReview.title: Real Salt Lake v Minnesota United: Ramsay espère capitaliser sur le blanchissage de Seattle
preReview.description: Minnesota United poursuivra sa lutte pour la première place de la Conférence Ouest lorsqu'ils affronteront le Real Salt Lake en déplacement.

preReview.title: Real Salt Lake gegen Minnesota United: Ramsay hofft auf Ausweitung des Shutouts gegen Seattle
preReview.description: Minnesota United wird seinen Kampf um die Spitzenposition in der Western Conference fortsetzen, wenn sie auswärts auf Real Salt Lake treffen.

preReview.title: ريال سولت ليك ضد مينيسوتا يونايتد: رامسي يأمل في البناء على الشباك النظيفة ضد سياتل
preReview.description: سيواصل مينيسوتا يونايتد كفاحه من أجل التصدر في المؤتمر الغربي عندما يواجه ريال سولت ليك خارج ملعبه.

preReview.title: Real Salt Lake x Minnesota United: Ramsay espera construir sobre o jogo sem sofrer gols em Seattle
preReview.description: O Minnesota United continuará sua luta pela liderança na Conferência Oeste quando enfrentar o Real Salt Lake fora de casa.

QAData.question: Who won between Real Salt Lake and Minnesota United on Sun, 24 Aug 2025 01:30:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Minnesota United won 3–1 over Real Salt Lake on Sun, 24 Aug 2025 01:30:00 GMT.
